_meta.keyKnowledge: We interpret music in various forms and styles, manipulating music elements and using style-specific vocal and instrumental techniques.

_source.w: We interpret music in various forms and styles, manipulating music elements and using style-specific vocal and instrumental techniques.
y: Sophisticated interpretation requires deep understanding of how musical elements create meaning within different styles.
Mastering style-specific techniques enables us to perform diverse music with authenticity and expression.
Interpretive skill is what transforms technical proficiency into genuinely musical performance.
eg: We interpret music from contrasting styles, applying appropriate techniques and conventions.
We make informed interpretive choices about tempo, dynamics, phrasing and articulation.
We perform demanding repertoire that demonstrates both technical mastery and musical understanding.
We study how professional musicians interpret the same piece differently and discuss the choices.
We perform in ensembles that require sophisticated listening and responsiveness.
We develop our personal interpretive voice while respecting the conventions of each style.
